transcript: Welcome to game review everybody! We did a 4v4 in the backyard and today I'm gonna be reviewing that mat. Now I used to do these all the time but COVID happened. All the leagues were shut down there were no basketball leagues to play in so that's why I haven't done a game review but you guys used to love these so let's just do one in the backyard. The people in the black shirts are one team and everyone in the other colored shirts are another team. We're doing a best two out of three. Games are 2-11. And if you do enjoy it and if if you... And if you do end up enjoying this video, please consider hitting that subscribe button. It would mean a lot. You can unsubscribe at any time. Let's hop into it. Zach just speaking facts. Straight away, Jeff gets the ball. Pops a three. I'm disrespecting his jumper, but the rebound he got himself. MMG gets the ball. Jeff gets the ball. I'm disrespecting his shot. He can shoot that three, but MMG is the ultimate rebounder. Sittling off the ball Our point gets the ball i'm disrespecting his shot he could shoot that three but mmg is the ultimate rebounder shivlin off the ball our point guard that's my camera man baby with the little magician what the sauce zach's bringing up the ball mmg sets him a screen wide open three it's a brick though and i literally passed it to mmg who faked out efron got the wide open jumper That's his specialty after that i'm taking up the ball tween behind horrible pass to james like if i had a better pass he would have been wide open for three doesn't matter though i lied i capped jeff had the ball on me i played extremely lazy defense one under the screen in my eyes bro i get the ball i'm jibbling up the court i see a 3v1 no between your routine let's go fuck it baby that's actually my move i did like the same move during the live stream oh no he did oh no that's moving up the ball little hezy behind step back i'm jumping off the ball i see my boy efron hustling on the baseline so i'm like i'm gonna give him the wide open three splash johnny's dribbling up the ball decides to take a pull up three i get the rebound and you know i'm running the offense i see my boy efron pass it we play like the warriors another pass another pass then we got the shot bingo baby johnny's got the mismatch on him he's got a baby on him trap takes the easy layup ties the game five to five and broad high key just passes it to Zach then I see Zach I'm like I gotta start playing some defense on him throws a wild pass trap gets it start the base drop boom I told you he was mini Stephen Curry Johnny with the cool flick dribble sees the mismatch once again i mean he's gonna take it and make it the mismatch bullying doesn't stop as jeff hands it off to johnny for another banked in shot six six six six i think so yeah yeah this is what we said the score was so i guess the score is now six to six has two i've ever gotten a score correctly we're literally too smooth to remember the score every time johnny's starting to heat up got the The microwave takes a little one-legger and bounces in the boy is taking out the ball little college pass to the big for the shot he does not take it though i see the cut i cut he doesn't see it i make it yes sir the literal post got himself mmg with one of the most aggressive crossovers i've ever seen decides to use his little michael jordan fade away and makes man bun giant l brings up the ball sees me running to the right so i'm like you know what time to put some sauce into this game little step back i was very surprised at that miss you could tell but thankfully i got my older brother there when i'm down he picks me up and he hits a three of his own baby let's go the haters are mad that jaidel is high-key saucy now finds me on a perfect cut and i skeet the layup i'm mad after i missed that shot i needed redemption so i guarded mfg and barely got him to miss the shot thankfully you know what time it is give me a base drop once again johnny's just going absolutely ballistic for them. Another point. At this point in the game, we said it was 10 to 10. Trapp drives in, great vision, finds me. I'll try to end the game with a three. But I miss. But thankfully, my boy Efron gets the ball. Spin move, baby. Crazy play for the win. Yes, sir. The sauce, what? Hey Jesse, I knew there was water on the court. Water? Water hasn't rained in months. What? Until tonight. I don't know. Starting off game two, Zach hits MMG, who gets a pump fake, two people jump in, Zach's wide open for the three, SPLAAAAAAASH. I got the ball, James hits me with a little pick and roll action, I don't see him open though so I throw it to Trav. Trav, throws it to James, James, to Efron, we are like the Warriors! Nevermind. Johnny has Trav on him, tries to do his signature bank shot, and Jeff just rips the rebound right out of my hands. That's disgusting. MMG's coming down with some of the most aggressive stutter steps I've ever seen in my life. Pulls it. And once again, Jeff just steals the rebound. It's ridiculous. Then he dribbles right to his spot, takes the midrange, and that's his spot. It's in. Give me a little base drop. Now Jeff's coming down after that shot, and he's trying to tell me he's the better shooter. But he's also ass. So we both miss, but MMG is just a rebounding god against it. Man bunjido gets it, tween, tween, tween, cross, cross, tween, drive in, two bit, pop step, yes sir. Zach has a little bit of a screen, decides not to use it, takes the mid-range pull-up, brick. We're gonna analyze this play in slow motion. I'm dribbling up the court, behind the back. All of a sudden, where is Jeff going? Next thing I see, man, is like this from my crossover. Low key ankle break. At least I thought so. I got excited. I passed the game for the wide open three switch. Jeff catches the ball on the wing, drives in into a little bit of a double team, but he's able to find Johnny, who just finesses with a little post hook and it's in. Jaidel gets a rebound. makes a layup we have the 6 5 245 pound beast with the most aggressive hop step i've ever played against he uses it once again the aggressive beast gets the ball does a hop step fade away thank god this one missed i get the rebound barely i see my boy efron behind pass they honestly surprised efron so he misses the layup then zach's like you know what I'm going down the court right now sees James little behind the back fake oh yes basketball is the most beautiful sport in the world when Jester has the ball it's like poetry in motion right here look at the beautiful footwork big giant L throws the ball down to Efron in the post he sees MMG lack it so he's like you like, you know what? I'm going to just go and cut. Gets a great cut. Easy lay-in. It is game right here. So you know what our team decides to do? Let's play the laziest defense possible. MJ just hits the fadeaway like the bells on the bulls. That's 1-1. Let's run it back. Now, ladies and gentlemen, it is time for the final match. Starting it out, I get switched on to Johnny, and it's a little 1vv1 situation I dare him to shoot. I don't think he's gonna shoot. He takes the d3. Oh In my face, I'm not gonna take that. It's my turn to get some revenge I'm trash. What can I say? But this is a motivation for everyone out there who's watching they call it a trash can not a trash can't believe in yourself always the black team is not playing around game three Zach from the half court logo just splashes it down for nothing we need to get them back so we unleash Efron baby brick we need a bucket Zydel goes down into the post his natural habitat sees a little opening takes the bank let's go but then mmg says nah i'm not gonna let james score in the post i'm scoring in the post but jaidel plays good defense i get the basketball i'm thinking in and out behind then i go down into the paint try to be a little sneaky with the flick and miss jeff gets the ball off that instantly thinks i gotta get to my spot so he slowly his spot and makes it, of course. Zach decides to give our team an extra point. We now have two. I don't know what to say. Zach with the ball decides to take an easy floater, advancing the score to six to two. Jynel goes back to his natural habitat with the Dirk fade and he makes it. I see MMG get the ball. So I have fear in my eyeballs. I'm about to get beat up. This man is strong. passes to johnny thank god then johnny does some kind of crazy pump fake to get open and makes it johnny with the ball sees jeff and then jeff notices a mismatch on mmg himself and they get the wide open layup still aggressive hop step for no reason johnny gets the ball in the way he tries to drive it on james gets stuck throws a turnover then trap sees me pause i notice Notice we have a pretty open fast break, so I'm thinking I'm gonna pad Efron's rebound and point stat. Obviously, I purposely missed the layup, so Efron can pad his stats. He gets the layup back, and there. And then, something magnificent happens. Zach decides to add an extra point for our team. Tynell's got the ball, I do a little cut fake, I go in, and then I do a crazy lay, baby. Instant replay. Y'all see the little uh you'll see the term man that's got the isolation i do a little cut fake i go in and then i do a crazy lay baby instant replay y'all see the little uh y'all see the turn man zach got the isolation on f run you know he's taking advantage like three tweens another team pull up it's an air ball but mmg is just ridiculous gets the rebound and then zach says man i ain't missing twice boom the score is nine to seven at this point so i'm thinking jesse i need to get some. It's time to take this game into my own hand. I know what I need to do. I get the ball. I don't see a hand up. Man down. Boom, baby. That's a three. Nine eight. Look at me swag walking backwards. I got this. I'm collected. MMG is taking up the ball. Cross over, then sees Johnny on the wing. Johnny drives in. Steeds the flick. Gets it back. Pass fakes. Trav off him. Takes the layup. That is 10 points. It is game point. Literally just need one more to win. I'm not gonna let this team win. I demand the ball. I take the three-pointer over. Let's go. The game is tied 10-10. And Zach wants to be the hero. Drives in. Gets the ball back. Throws it out to Johnny. Then Johnny decides to drive in. Shows it behind to Zach. Then it goes out of bounds. Then Jeff decides to be the hero drives in gets the ball back throws it out to johnny then johnny decides to drive in throws it behind the step then it goes out of bounds then jeff decides to be the hero sees a little bit of an opening but there's a double team and he shoots it anyway people and he misses we get the ball this is my time to shine i cross in i see about three of them near me and i'm like i see trap wide open for the win trap slow mo then jeff gets the rebound and i literally tap it against him trap finds me i'm pumping say you guys are watching two other game reviews are pumping out 30k likes i'll do another one and peace
